data.title: S&P 500 closes with another all-time high, led by crypto stocks amid euphoric wins
data.description:
The S&P 500 locked in its ninth all-time closing high of 2025 on Thursday, climbing 0. 54% to 6,297. 36, as crypto stocks ripped higher, and investors got slammed with better-than-expected earnings. Nasdaq Composite ended at 20,885. 65, up 0. 75%, posting its tenth record of the year. The Dow Jones added 229. 71 points, or 0. 52%, to close at […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sp-500-closes-with-another-all-time-high/

data.title: Jack Dorsey’s Block is joining the S&P 500, stock surges by 10%
data.description:
Block is getting bumped up to the S&P 500, and investors are not wasting time reacting. On Friday, shares of the company jumped more than 10% after hours, according to S&P Global, which announced that Block will replace Hess in the index starting before the opening bell on July 23. The shake-up follows Chevron’s $54 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jack-dorseys-block-is-joining-the-sp-500/

data.description:
